trans_title: 漆黑的夜晚，黑暗的地方
introduction: SYNOPSISCheol disguises himself as a bank robber and flees to Bangkok according to a plan devised by the bank president. Mi-ae plans to take revenge for her father who was defrauded of his entire fortune by the bank president. She seeks out Cheol and starts a relationship with him. Cheol has no idea who she is and enjoys her company while waiting for the bank president to wire the money. When Cheol and Mi-ae take a boat ride, she dumps him in the ocean and leaves him there to die. But Cheol survives because he had actually known about Mi-ae and her plans all along. Cheol and the bank president feigned ignorance to pull off the perfect crime. But the police refuses to give up on their relentless pursuit of the two men.故事铁下由银行计划在银行皮毛，逃往曼谷。弥在nonggan银行先后获得铁，以支付他父亲的敌人挥霍了一笔。钢铁知道它会发送因为杰西的一个非常愉快和充满希望的日子教训是躲起来了，等着寄钱给予银行家。然后用杰西船的铁出海。杰西然后把铁放回大海孤单。然而，铁是不是死了。铁已经知道杰西会叫任何人。铁是刺目，银行和完美的犯罪不知道杰西的方法。但是，警方正在追查所有的方式，而不会失去他们。
chinese_title: 漆黑的夜晚，黑暗的地方
